summary: Get caught up.

title: Modi Courts Indo-Pacific Partners as China, US Reshape Region
title_cn: 中美重塑地区格局，莫迪向印太合作伙伴示好
summary: From missiles and uranium to critical minerals and sports diplomacy, Prime Minister Narendra Modi used a three-nation tour to deepen India’s Indo-Pacific partnerships as regional powers strengthen ties amid China’s growing influence and uncertainty over US engagement.

title: Warsh and US Inflation Will Set Tone for July Fed Decision
title_cn: 沃什和美国通胀将为 7 月美联储决策定下基调
summary: Kevin Warsh is about to make his first appearance before Congress as Federal Reserve chairman, and during two days of testimony he’ll have new US inflation data to parse with lawmakers.

title: Banks’ Record Bond Short Sparks Quest for Answers
title_cn: 银行创纪录的债券空头引发寻求答案
summary: For the first time in recent history, primary dealers have gone net short on debt they used to hold billions of dollars of.

title: Patriot Supply Strains Shape Ukraine Aid
title_cn: 爱国者供应菌株塑造乌克兰援助
summary: Axios defense reporter Colin Demarest says President Donald Trump's proposal to let Ukraine produce Patriot interceptors faces significant manufacturing, licensing and technology hurdles, making it unlikely to address Kyiv's immediate air defense needs. He says shortages of advanced interceptors continue to raise broader questions about defense industrial capacity, while Ukraine's rapid innovation in drones is reshaping how allies think about modern warfare. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hannah Elliott Highlights Tinnitus Risks
title_cn: 汉娜·埃利奥特 (Hannah Elliott) 强调耳鸣风险
summary: Bloomberg Pursuit staff writer Hannah Elliott says Tinnitus affects more than 50 million Americans, remains underdiagnosed and underfunded, and can have profound effects on mental health and quality of life. She says growing awareness of hearing health and new treatments, including the FDA-cleared Lenire device, offer hope as researchers work to better understand and treat the condition. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: McCaul Backs Deeper US Ukraine Defense Ties
title_cn: 麦考尔支持深化美乌防务关系
summary: Rep. Michael McCaul says Ukraine is gaining momentum on the battlefield but urgently needs more Patriot interceptors and stronger air defenses to counter Russia's escalating missile attacks. He urges deeper US-Ukraine defense cooperation, including licensed Patriot production and joint drone development, while arguing sustained military pressure offers the best path to negotiations with Russia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Navy Chief Says US Needs More Warships
title_cn: 海军参谋长表示美国需要更多军舰
summary: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle says the US Navy needs a larger fleet, faster shipbuilding and expanded munitions production to meet growing global demands while sustaining readiness across multiple theaters. He says the service remains prepared despite heavy operational commitments, points to record recruiting and retention, and argues rebuilding the US industrial base is critical to long-term national security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Iran Talks Face Persistent Impasse
title_cn: 美国伊朗谈判面临持续僵局
summary: Bloomberg Economics analysts Becca Wasser and Dina Esfandiary say the US and Iran remain far apart on key issues, with intermittent strikes and negotiations likely to define the conflict for the foreseeable future. They say technical talks on Iran's nuclear program are a constructive step, but disputes over the Strait of Hormuz, sanctions and implementation of the memorandum of understanding continue to hinder progress. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can the Tax System Keep Up with Trillionaires?
title_cn: 税收制度能跟上亿万富翁的步伐吗？
summary: Elon Musk has become the world’s first trillionaire following SpaceX’s record-breaking IPO, creating a fortune unlike anything seen in modern history. Nobel Laureate Paul Krugman and Yale economist Natasha Sarin argue the milestone is about far more than one entrepreneur’s wealth—it reflects how today’s economy rewards ownership of rapidly-appreciating assets, and exposes the limits of a tax system designed more than a century ago. Bloomberg wealth reporter Ben Steverman notes that while America has seen fortunes of comparable economic influence before, the concentration of wealth in today’s technology sector has reignited debates over taxation, political influence, inequality, and whether capitalism can continue rewarding innovation without widening the gap between the very richest Americans and everyone else. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Reopening Faces Costly Hurdles
title_cn: 霍尔木兹重新开放面临代价高昂的障碍
summary: Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations Clara Gillespie says Gulf energy flows face an uncertain recovery as producers work to clear ships, bring in tankers, restart halted output and repair damage to refineries, LNG facilities and ports. She says the Strait of Hormuz remains unstable, with shipping still below prewar levels and US pressure on Iran complicating efforts to restore safe passage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Dispute Clouds US Iran Diplomacy
title_cn: 霍尔木兹争端给美国伊朗外交蒙上阴影
summary: Bloomberg News Middle East reporter Dan Williams says negotiations between the US and Iran remain focused on securing freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, even as President Donald Trump's escalating rhetoric underscores the fragile state of the ceasefire. Williams says Iran's leadership remains opaque, questioned claims that recent attacks on commercial shipping reflected a command failure, and warned that Tehran could emerge with greater strategic leverage if it retains effective control over the vital waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fuel Prices Are Slamming Consumers Even as Crude Crisis Fades
title_cn: 尽管原油危机消退，燃油价格仍对消费者造成重创
summary: Prices for gasoline, diesel and jet fuel are rebounding even as crude oil eases, a rare divergence that’s swelling costs for peak-season travelers and threatening to undermine President Donald Trump’s pledge to quash inflation ahead of midterm elections.

title: Stocks Priced for ‘Sunshine and Rainbows’ Now Face Earnings Test
title_cn: 以“阳光和彩虹”定价的​​股票现在面临盈利测试
summary: Wall Street is anticipating a near-record earnings season, but for investors a key question remains: Will it be enough to keep stock market bulls running?

title: The World’s First Trillionaire and the Company He Won’t Let Go
title_cn: 世界上第一位亿万富翁和他不会放手的公司
summary: Elon Musk made history last month.

title: China Tells Refiners to Keep Fuel Output High as Iran War Drags
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争的拖延，中国要求炼油厂保持高燃料产量
summary: China instructed some major refiners to keep fuel production high, according to people familiar with the matter, in an effort to protect domestic consumers as strikes in the Persian Gulf once again threaten oil shipments.

title: Eni’s Descalzi Says Energy Crisis May Worsen in Short Term: Sole
title_cn: 埃尼集团的德斯卡尔齐表示能源危机短期内可能会恶化：Sole
summary: The global energy situation could deteriorate further as oil inventories decline and competition for supplies intensifies, Eni SpA’s Chief Executive Officer Claudio Descalzi told Italian daily Il Sole 24 Ore.

title: China Power Load Hits Early Record as Data, EV Demand Rises
title_cn: 随着数据和电动汽车需求上升，中国电力负荷创历史新高
summary: China’s nationwide electricity load reached a record high for the first time this year on July 10, hitting 1.518 billion kilowatts, the National Energy Administration said in a statement posted on its official WeChat account Saturday.

title: India, NZ Plan Strategic Partnership Including Maritime Security
title_cn: 印度和新西兰计划建立包括海上安全在内的战略伙伴关系
summary: India and New Zealand will elevate their relationship to a “strategic partnership,” as both seek closer trade and security ties.

title: Xi Says China’s Backing for Kim and North Korea Won’t Change
title_cn: 习近平称中国对金正恩和朝鲜的支持不会改变
summary: President Xi Jinping said China’s commitment to its friendship with North Korea, support for Kim Jong Un’s leadership and determination to safeguard the two countries’ common interests “will not change,” Xinhua News Agency reported on Saturday.

title: Kazakh Tycoon Turlov’s Freedom Raises $300 Million for Expansion
title_cn: 哈萨克斯坦大亨图尔洛夫的Freedom筹集3亿美元用于扩张
summary: Kazakhstan billionaire Timur Turlov’s Freedom Holding Corp. raised $300 million in a share sale to help fund its ongoing international expansion.

summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Winnie Cisar, CreditSights Global Head of Strategy, John Medina, Moody's Ratings SVP, Global Project and Infrastructure Finance, Tom Fitzgerald, TD Cowen VP, Equity Research, Gary Gensler, Former SEC Chair, Jeffrey Sherman, DoubleLine Capital Deputy Chief Investment Officer, Macrae Sykes, Gabelli Funds Portfolio Manager, Chad Mumm, Pro Shop Co-Founder and President, Nora Wittstruck, S&P Global Ratings Chief Analytical Officer for Governments, and Michael Chang, Clear Health CEO. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: MGM Resorts International is engaged in deal talks with Barry Diller’s People Inc. after the entertainment mogul offered to acquire the part of the casino company he doesn’t already own, the Wall Street Journal reported.

title: S&P Global: FIFA to Offer Short-Term Economic Boost
title_cn: 标准普尔全球：国际足联将提供短期经济提振
summary: Nora Wittstruck, Chief Analytical Officer for Governments at S&P Global, joined Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's 'The Close' to provide insights on FIFA's financial position during the 2026 World Cup. She highlights how FIFA has emerged financially stronger despite facing numerous controversies during the tournament. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pro Shop's Chad Mumm on 'Full Swing,' Golf in 2026
title_cn: Pro Shop 的 Chad Mumm 畅谈 2026 年高尔夫“Full Swing”
summary: Chad Mumm, Co-Founder of Pro Shop and Producer of the Netflix series 'Full Swing,' talks about the world's number-one ranked golfer, Scottie Scheffler, missing the cut at the Scottish Open. He also discusses golf's surge in popularity and the anticipation for the upcoming season of 'Full Swing.' Mumm joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's 'The Close.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gensler: Big Deals a Sign of 'High-Valuation Market'
title_cn: Gensler：大交易是“高估值市场”的标志
summary: Gary Gensler, Former SEC Chair and professor at MIT Sloan School of Management, joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's 'The Close' and discusses the significant return of IPO activity including SK Hynix, which raised $26.5 billion in the largest foreign debut in the US, Google's $85 billion capital raise and SpaceX going public. He says these big deals are a sign of 'high-valuation market.'  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Money 7/10/2026
title_cn: 彭博财经 2026 年 7 月 10 日
summary: Bloomberg Money takes the pulse of your financial life, powered by the reporting of our global newsroom. Today's guests are: University of Chicago Booth School Professor of Economics and Former Fed Governor Randall Kroszner and NewEdge Wealth CIO Cameron Dawson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Debut Is a Bet That AI Breaks Boom-and-Bust Chip Cycle
title_cn: SK海力士首次亮相是人工智能打破芯片繁荣与萧条周期的赌注
summary: South Korean memory chipmaker SK Hynix Inc. just pulled off the largest public listing by a foreign company in US market history. Shares soared 13% on their first day of trading.

title: Rhode Island Jail Operator Files Bankruptcy to Cut Bond Debt
title_cn: 罗德岛监狱运营商申请破产以削减债券债务
summary: Central Falls Detention Facility Corp., which houses federal detainees including people arrested by the US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agency, filed for bankruptcy saying it cannot afford to keep paying on more than $167 million in bond debt.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over AI Talent Fight
title_cn: 苹果因人工智能人才争夺战起诉 OpenAI
summary: Bloomberg Tech host Ed Ludlow says Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI reflects an intensifying battle for AI talent and hardware leadership, with Apple alleging former employees improperly took trade secrets as OpenAI expands its device ambitions. He also says SK Hynix expects AI memory demand to outpace supply, plans to increase US investment beyond $35 billion, and sees the next test for the AI boom coming as technology companies report earnings and investors assess whether spending is translating into profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Engineer’s ‘LOL’ Moment Set Stage for Legal Fight With Apple
title_cn: OpenAI 工程师的“哈哈”时刻为与苹果的法律斗争奠定了基础
summary: When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI’s nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience.

title: Why Fox is ‘the most Disciplined’ Media Entertainment Company in the Streaming Era
title_cn: 为什么福克斯是流媒体时代“最自律”的媒体娱乐公司
summary: Media veteran Michael Wolf discusses Allen & Company’s annual Sun Valley Conference and breaks down the mega deals that are reshaping the entertainment industry. He explains why free ad-supported content is the unsung winner of the streaming wars, and digs into the ways AI is changing the value of content.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent in Talks to Take Big Manus Stake After Meta Deal Unwound
title_cn: Meta 交易解除后，腾讯洽谈收购 Manus 大量股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is in discussions to become the largest external shareholder in Manus, in a deal to buy back the agentic AI pioneer after Chinese regulators struck down Meta Platforms Inc.’s blockbuster acquisition.

title: OpenAI Safety Head Heidecke to Leave Firm After Reshuffle: Wired
title_cn: OpenAI 安全主管 Heidecke 将在改组后离开公司：《连线》
summary: OpenAI head of safety Johannes Heidecke is leaving the artificial intelligence company following a reorganization, according to Wired.

title: US Eases Export Curbs on UAE, Opening Door for AI Chip Sales
title_cn: 美国放宽对阿联酋的出口限制，为人工智能芯片销售打开大门
summary: The Trump administration plans to ease export restrictions on the United Arab Emirates, clearing the way for the Gulf state to buy a broad range of advanced technologies including semiconductors needed to boost its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft in Pivotal Case
title_cn: 苹果在 Pivotal 案件中起诉 OpenAI 盗窃商业秘密
summary: Apple Inc. sued OpenAI for trade secret theft, accusing the artificial intelligence startup and its hardware chief of engaging in a coordinated campaign to steal information about upcoming products.

title: Hedge Fund Elliott Builds Stake in Software Firm CCC
title_cn: 对冲基金 Elliott 增持软件公司 CCC 股份
summary: Elliott Investment Management has built a large stake in car-insurance software provider CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc., which has been exploring a potential sale, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gates Heir’s Shopping App Claimed Sales It Didn’t Drive
title_cn: 盖茨继承人的购物应用程序声称其并未推动销售
summary: Phia, an advertising startup co-founded by Phoebe Gates, daughter of billionaire Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates, bills itself as a “personal shopping assistant” that helps users find the lowest prices on a broad range of clothes and fashion accessories.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft
title_cn: 苹果起诉 OpenAI 窃取商业秘密
summary: Apple sued OpenAI for trade secret theft, accusing the artificial intelligence startup and its hardware chief of engaging in a coordinated campaign to steal information about upcoming products. Apple alleges that OpenAI encouraged Apple employees to share information, components, drawings and other materials related to upcoming products. Mark Gurman reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lumen Completes Acquisition of Cloud Networking Firm Alkira
title_cn: Lumen 完成对云网络公司 Alkira 的收购
summary: Chris Stansbury, CFO, of Lumen and Nina Trentmann, Bloomberg News Senior Editor join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily discuss their recent acquisition of Alkira, a cloud-native networking company that helps enterprises manage connectivity across cloud, data center, and edge environments through a single control plane. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Climbs 13% After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国发行创纪录的 265 亿美元股票后股价上涨 13%
summary: SK Hynix Inc. delivered a 13% gain in its debut trading day on a US exchange, after breaking the record for the biggest first-time share sale by a foreign company.

title: SK Hynix CEO Expects Memory Crunch to Last Beyond 2030
title_cn: SK 海力士首席执行官预计内存短缺将持续到 2030 年之后
summary: The memory-chip shortages that are roiling the computer, car and device markets will probably persist beyond 2030, according to SK Hynix Inc. Chief Executive Officer Kwak Noh-Jung.

title: SK Hynix Starts Trading on Nasdaq, Opens 14% Above Offer Price | Bloomberg Tech 7/10/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士开始在纳斯达克交易，开盘价较发行价高出 14% |彭博科技 2026 年 7 月 10 日
summary: Ed Ludlow sits down for an interview with SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won from the Nasdaq to discuss SK Hynix's US listing, the biggest-ever by a foreign company. Meanwhile, Bloomberg’s David Gura takes a look at SK Hynix shares as they start trading on the Nasdaq, and dives deeper into the listing's impact on the rest of the US chip sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq President Sees SK Hynix Listing Growing Foreign IPO Pipeline
title_cn: 纳斯达克总裁认为 SK 海力士上市将增加海外 IPO 渠道
summary: Nasdaq President Nelson Griggs says the record-breaking SK Hynix ADR listing is already attracting looks from more foreign companies that may consider US listings. He says JPMorgan Chase struck the right balance on the SK Hynix pricing. Griggs speaks to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow in New York at the Nasdaq.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Promises ‘Much, Much Bigger’ US Investment Plan
title_cn: SK董事长承诺“规模更大”的美国投资计划
summary: SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won, fresh off a landmark US stock offering for the conglomerate’s memory-chip business, said he has an ambitious plan to invest more money in America.

title: SK Hynix ADRs Surge After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
title_cn: SK 海力士 ADR 在美国发行创纪录的 265 亿美元后飙升
summary:
SK Hynix Inc.’s American depositary receipts surged above their offering price, after the South Korean memory chipmaker raised $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company.

The ADRs opened at $170 each on Friday in New York, versus an offering price of $149 apiece. The successful mega-listing brushed aside concern over recent volatility among chipmakers, demonstrating investors have plenty of appetite for direct exposure to SK Hynix’s dominant position in high-bandwidth memory for artificial intelligence computing. The ADRs are trading at a premium of about 17% over the closing price of the Seoul-listed common stock, due in part to restrictions on exchanging the South Korean stock for the US instruments.

We get reaction from Anthony Hughes, Bloomberg News US ECM Reporter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Chey Tae-won on SK Hynix Debut, AI Demand and US Plans
title_cn: SK 董事长 Chey Tae-won 谈 SK 海力士的首次亮相、人工智能需求和美国计划
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, says they waited a long time to list SK Hynix in the US and calls it a "dream come true." The head of the South Korean chipmaker talks about raising $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company and also discusses the outlook for AI demand and his US investment plans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Payment Firms Emerge as Target in Fight Against Illegal Casinos
title_cn: 支付公司成为打击非法赌场的目标
summary: A trade body for European gambling companies has filed a complaint to the Lithuanian banking regulator seeking an investigation of a payment company that it alleges props up illegal online casinos.

title: Thornburg's Di Zhou Sees Memory Supercycle
title_cn: Thornburg 的周迪看到了记忆超级周期
summary: SK Hynix's US debut is off to a strong start, with its ADRs indicated to open above the offering price. Di Zhou, portfolio manager at Thornburg Investment Management, says, "We're currently in a memory supercycle. Fundamentals are very strong, and SK Hynix is one of the highest-quality pure-play memory companies globally." She speaks on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Delayed Xbox Layoffs Leave Employees Scared And Nervous
title_cn: Xbox 延迟裁员让员工感到害怕和紧张
summary: Xbox cut 1,600 jobs this week and plans to cut another 1,600 over the next 12 months, leaving remaining staff on tenterhooks

title: SK Chairman Says He Has 'Much, Much Bigger' Plans for US
title_cn: SK董事长表示他对美国有“更大、更大”的计划
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, discusses his plan  to invest more money in the US. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Says Company May Offer ‘Memory as a Service’
title_cn: SK董事长表示公司可能提供“内存即服务”
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is considering new ways of selling access to its memory chips, including a concept called “memory as a service,” suggesting customers could rent usage from the South Korean company rather than purchasing the actual semiconductors.

title: SK Chairman Has 'Some Confidence' Demand Will Grow
title_cn: SK董事长对需求将会增长“有信心”
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, says customers have been telling him they want the company to expand more. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Builds AI Agents That Beat 60/40 Model in Backtests
title_cn: 摩根大通构建的人工智能代理在回测中击败了 60/40 模型
summary: As investors increasingly turn to artificial intelligence for help with everything from stock picking to risk management, JPMorgan Chase & Co. has been testing whether a model can do something more ambitious: allocate money itself.

title: Government Action is Crucial for AI Entrepreneurs Says Pelgo CEO
title_cn: Pelgo 首席执行官表示，政府行动对人工智能企业家至关重要
summary:
Artificial intelligence could reshape the jobs of nearly 80 million people across Southeast Asia, but there is little sign it has led to large-scale employment cuts, according to the International Labour Organization.
The ILO urged governments to strengthen AI governance and better integrate AI policies through a human-centered approach to help workers and businesses adapt.
Pelgo CEO Chieh Huang discusses how AI is impacting the labor market and how it could serve as a tool for displaced workers rather than a job eliminator. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Bust Fallout Would Be 'More Significant' Than Dot-Com, Says George Noble
title_cn: 乔治·诺布尔 (George Noble) 表示，人工智能泡沫破灭的影响将比互联网泡沫“更严重”
summary:
The US stock market’s rally to new highs has been propelled by so few stocks that it’s reminding some on Wall Street of the runup to the dot-com bubble.
George Noble, Managing Partner of Noble Capital Advisors, discusses the AI trade and how he believes the coming bust would be much worse than the dot-com bubble fallout. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Chairman Calls SK Hynix US Debut a 'Dream Come True'
title_cn: SK董事长称SK海力士在美国的首次亮相是“梦想成真”
summary: Chey Tae-won, chairman of SK Hynix parent SK Group, discusses SK Hynix's listing on the Nasdaq and says he hopes to expand the ADR size once there is a good return. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Stocks Are Overbought, Morgan Stanley's Shalett Warns
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的沙利特警告说，半导体股票已超买
summary: Lisa Shalett, Morgan Stanley Wealth Management CIO, discusses the current state of the semiconductor sector, highlighting that chip stocks have become meaningfully overbought with some indexes up nearly 100% year-to-date before recent pullbacks. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Subpoenas NY Times Reporters Over Air Force One Story
title_cn: 美国就空军一号的报道向《纽约时报》记者发出传票
summary: Federal prosecutors issued subpoenas late Friday compelling four New York Times journalists to reveal their sources for two stories about security shortcomings on the new Qatari-gifted presidential jet, the news organization said.

title: McConnell’s Absence Prompts New Beshear Demand for Health Update
title_cn: 麦康奈尔的缺席引发了新的贝希尔对健康更新的需求
summary: Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear, a Democrat, renewed his call for Mitch McConnell, the senior Republican senator from his state, to release information about his health after he was hospitalized on June 14 and hasn’t been seen publicly since.

title: Le Pen Extends Lead in French Election Poll After Court Ruling
title_cn: 法院裁决后勒庞扩大法国大选民调领先优势
summary: Marine Le Pen extended her lead in a voter preference poll ahead of next April’s French presidential election after appeal judges cleared her to enter the race for a fourth time by shortening a previous ban on her standing.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Trump Threats to “Decimate” Iran, Trade Secret Lawsuit
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 |特朗普威胁“消灭”伊朗，商业秘密诉讼
summary:
The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Clara Gillespie, Council on Foreign Relations Sr. Fellow for Climate & Energy, and Colin Demarest, Future of Defense Reporter for Axios.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democrats Race to Fill Maine Senate Slot
title_cn: 民主党竞相填补缅因州参议院席位
summary: Bloomberg's Boston Bureau Chief Brooke Sutherland says Maine Democrats are racing to choose a new Senate nominee after Graham Platner withdrew, leaving the party with little time to unify behind a replacement in a race viewed as critical to control of the Senate. She says party leaders face pressure over the candidate vetting process as delegates prepare to select a nominee from a crowded field ahead of the filing deadline. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malaysia’s Ex-Ruling Party Wins Johor Vote in Blow to Anwar
title_cn: 马来西亚前执政党赢得柔佛州选票，打击安瓦尔
summary: Malaysia’s former ruling party Barisan Nasional emerged as the comfortable winner of Johor state assembly elections on Saturday, delivering another setback to Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s Pakatan Harapan coalition following its poor local election showing in Sabah last year.

title: Ukraine Building Patriots Is in Lockheed’s Interest, McCaul Says
title_cn: 麦考尔表示，乌克兰建造爱国者号符合洛克希德公司的利益
summary: US defense contractors including Lockheed Martin Corp. have every interest to let Ukraine manufacture Patriot missile interceptors after President Donald Trump pledged the US would grant a license for the weapons system, a senior Republican lawmaker said.

title: Trump Undercuts GOP Midterms Message With Snub of Housing Bill
title_cn: 特朗普冷落住房法案削弱了共和党中期选举的信息
summary: A sweeping housing bill became law on Saturday without Donald Trump’s signature, or any White House fanfare, after the president soured on a package of dozens of affordability provisions that he derided as “a yawn.”

title: Burnham’s Grip on No. 10 Is Firm But His Plans Are Not
title_cn: 伯纳姆牢牢掌握着第十名的位置，但他的计划却并非如此
summary: Andy Burnham is now certain to be the UK’s next prime minister. What’s uncertain is almost everything else concerning his plans for government, with their detail still obscure to allies just 10 days out.

title: Iran Rejects US Talks as Trump Issues Fresh Threat to Tehran
title_cn: 特朗普对德黑兰发出新威胁，伊朗拒绝美国会谈
summary: Iran rejected US President Donald Trump’s contention that peace talks could continue without a ceasefire, saying Washington must meet Tehran’s conditions for resolving transit issues through the Strait of Hormuz and normalizing its oil exports.

title: UK Police Say Ex-Minister Likely Attacked Day Before Body Found
title_cn: 英国警方称前部长可能在尸体被发现前一天遭到袭击
summary: UK police said they believe that former minister and Reform UK politician Ann Widdecombe was attacked almost 24 hours before she was found dead at her home on Thursday morning.

title: Indonesia’s Top Graft Prosecutor Resigns as Probe Widens
title_cn: 随着调查范围扩大，印度尼西亚最高贪污检察官辞职
summary: Indonesia’s top corruption prosecutor has resigned, days after a police raid of his house uncovered gold bars and millions of dollars in cash.

title: Canada Gives Share of Bridge Profits to US to Get Trump Go-Ahead
title_cn: 加拿大向美国提供过桥利润份额，以让特朗普获得批准
summary: The US and Canada will open the delayed Gordie Howe International Bridge connecting Detroit with Windsor, Ontario, on July 27, after the Canadian government agreed to give the US a share of net toll profits, according to officials familiar with the matter.

title: Moldovan President Designates Investor Vasile Tofan as Premier
title_cn: 摩尔多瓦总统任命投资者瓦西里·托凡为总理
summary: Moldova’s President Maia Sandu nominated Harvard Business School graduate and prominent investor Vasile Tofan as prime minister after former leader Alexandru Munteanu unexpectedly resigned last week.

title: EU Warns Push to Diversify Away From China Will Need Funding
title_cn: 欧盟警告称，推动多元化、远离中国将需要资金
summary: The European Union is developing a “solidarity instrument” to support companies that diversify critical supplies away from China and cushion the impact of any retaliation by Beijing in the event of a trade conflict.

title: UK’s Reeves to Focus on AI Opportunities in Speech to City
title_cn: 英国里夫斯将在城市演讲中关注人工智能机会
summary: Rachel Reeves heads to what’s likely to be her last City of London event next week, a final opportunity to defend her legacy after almost exactly two years as the UK’s first woman Chancellor of the Exchequer.

title: Trump Vows to Decimate Iran If It Carries Out Assassination Plot
title_cn: 特朗普发誓如果伊朗实施暗杀阴谋，他将摧毁伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump warned Iran that the US military would “completely decimate and destroy all areas” of the Islamic Republic if its leaders attempted or carried out his assassination.

title: Platner Quits Maine Race as Democrats Seek Quick Replacement
title_cn: 普拉特纳退出缅因州竞选，民主党寻求快速替代者
summary: Graham Platner officially withdrew from the race for a US Senate seat in Maine following sexual assault allegations, bringing an end to a tumultuous campaign that has left Democrats racing to find a last-minute replacement in a crucial race.

title: Housing Bill Set to Become Law Without Trump Signature | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/10/2026
title_cn: 住房法案将在特朗普未签署的情况下成为法律权力平衡：最新版 07/10/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Democratic Congressman Emanuel Cleaver of Missouri, ranking member of the House Financial Services Subcommittee on Housing and Insurance, reacts to the 21st Century Housing Act set to become law without President Trump's signature. Larry Sabato, founder and director of the University of Virginia Center for Politics, says Democrats still have a chance to win Maine's Senate race after Graham Platner formally withdrew from the race, but warns party divisions could leave Susan Collins favored. Brian Gant, a former Secret Service and FBI agent, discusses President Trump's decision to return from Turkey on the older Air Force One after reports raised questions about defensive capabilities on the newer Qatari-donated jet. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Secret Service Agent on Air Force One Security
title_cn: 先生。空军一号安全特工
summary: Brian Gant, a former Secret Service and FBI agent, discusses President Trump's decision to return from Turkey on the older Air Force One after reports raised questions about defensive capabilities on the newer Qatari-donated jet. He says any aircraft carrying the President needs the "full complete security package," including countermeasures, missile-spoofing capabilities and secure communications. Gant also discusses Trump's security posture amid reports of a fresh Iranian threat, saying he has "every confidence" agencies will protect the President. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sabato: Democrats Still Have A Chance In Maine
title_cn: 萨巴托：民主党在缅因州仍有机会
summary: Larry Sabato, founder and director of the University of Virginia Center for Politics, says Democrats still have a chance to win Maine's Senate race after Graham Platner formally withdrew from the race, but warns party divisions could leave Susan Collins favored. Sabato notes Maine was supposed to be an easy pickup for Democrats, but is now "turning out to be tough," while Senate races in Ohio, Iowa and Alaska look "more possible" than predicted. He also reacts to President Trump's removal of Election Assistance Commission members, calling it "disturbing," and says Trump's refusal to sign the bipartisan housing bill is a "big missed opportunity." He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Cleaver: Trump's Housing Snub Was 'Bad Advice'
title_cn: 众议员克里弗：特朗普的住房冷落是“糟糕的建议”
summary: Democratic Congressman Emanuel Cleaver of Missouri, ranking member of the House Financial Services Subcommittee on Housing and Insurance, reacts to the 21st Century Housing Act set to become law without President Trump's signature. Cleaver, who helped craft the bipartisan legislation, calls it the most consequential housing bill in nearly half a century and says Trump threw "water on" a rare example of Republicans and Democrats working together. He also criticizes Trump's ouster of Election Assistance Commission members and says the President does not have the votes to pass his SAVE America Act. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Demands Iran Declare Strait of Hormuz Open to All Ships
title_cn: 美国要求伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡对所有船只开放
summary: The US is demanding that Iran issue a public statement that all channels of the Strait of Hormuz are open to shipping and that they will not attack transiting civilian vessels, according to senior administration officials.

title: Mali, Algeria Agree to Reopen Airspace After Months of Tensions
title_cn: 马里和阿尔及利亚在数月紧张局势后同意重新开放领空
summary: Mali and Algeria agreed to reopen their airspace to civilian and military aircraft and return ambassadors to their posts, signaling an easing of yearlong tensions between the northern African nations.

title: SK Hynix Climbs in US Debut, CEO Says Memory Crunch to Last |Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/10/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国首次亮相，首席执行官表示内存短缺将持续下去 |彭博商业周刊日报 7/10/2026
summary: Today Bloomberg Tech host Ed Ludlow details his conversation with SK Hynix CEO Kwak Noh-Jung as the South Korean memory chip maker makes its US debut. Then, Bloomberg White House and Washington correspondent discusses President Trump's dismissal of two Democrat members of the US Election Assistance Commission and the latest from the MidEast. Plus, Bloomberg senior editor Nina Trentmann is joined by Lumen CFO Chris Stansbury on providing AI infrastructure. Finally, Bloomberg 'Business of Sports' Host Vanessa Perdomo-Maglione is joined by Gotham FC governor Carolyn Tisch-Blodgett on the NWSL club's move to Queens and capitalizing on World Cup excitement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democrats Rush to Replace Platner as GOP Relishes Divisions
title_cn: 共和党陷入分裂，民主党人急于更换普拉特纳
summary: Graham Platner’s political demise in Maine has set off a scramble to find a replacement to take on Republican incumbent Senator Susan Collins, with at least eight Democrats entering the wide-open field and less than four months until the November midterms.

title: Here Are the Week’s Winners and Losers
title_cn: 这是本周的赢家和输家
summary: A NATO summit and a World Cup controversy dominated headlines.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Over | Balance of Power 7/10/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火已经结束权力平衡 7/10/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses the latest from DC. On today's show, former US Ambassador to Iraq James Jeffrey, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft Executive Vice President Trita Parsi. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over But Talks on Deal to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火已经结束，但协议谈判仍将继续
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over. His administration quickly moved to add additional pressure on Tehran.
